jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - upGrad - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!
